description:
Abdominal cramps during your period aren't just a severe annoyance, but they quite literally CRAMP your style.
No one wants to walk around holding their tummies, bent over like a hunchback in public.

We've got you though! Here's our yoga expert to rescue you with a few poses that will help relieve menstrual cramps and make you one happy camper!

Love and Merry Menstrual Days,
Faarah D  (Nutrition and Wellness Editor, Glamrs)

For more videos, log on to http://www.glamrs.com

chapters.title: lie down on your back with your feet stretched out
bring your sitting bones to the inside of your feet
extend the legs straight up against the wall
